description_long: This information point features a semi-circular, modern kiosk structure set on a large, dark circular platform with a subtle white border. The main kiosk is composed of a curved, white frame supporting several angled digital display screens, with a central, prominent screen likely used for public information or event details. The structure is sleek and minimalistic, with smooth surfaces and a futuristic aesthetic, suggesting the use of metal and glass or acrylic materials. The rear of the kiosk is enclosed, providing a clear front-facing interaction area for users. The platform is expansive, providing ample space for foot traffic and gathering, and the overall design is visually striking, suitable for high-traffic urban environments such as plazas or event spaces. The signage on the central screen is digital, allowing for dynamic content updates.
description: A sleek, semi-circular modern information kiosk with multiple digital display screens, set on a large, dark circular platform. The design is minimalistic and futuristic, ideal for urban public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved kiosk with multiple angled digital screens and a large central display, all set on a wide circular platform.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the kiosk structure and the curvature of the platform, with the screens visible at an angle.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the semi-circular arrangement of the kiosk and the full extent of the circular platform.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear enclosure of the kiosk and the platform's edge, with less visibility of the screens.
attribute_facade_detailing: The facade features smooth, unornamented white panels with integrated digital screens framed in dark, glossy material. The design emphasizes clean lines, subtle curves, and a high-tech appearance with minimal visible fasteners or joints.
